account_role_id.COMMENT: Default ACL role for team users

target_id.COMMENT: id of farm, farm_role from other tables

last_start_time.COMMENT: the last time task was started

released.COMMENT: The time when upgrade script is issued

appears.COMMENT: The time when upgrade does appear

applied.COMMENT: The time when update is successfully applied

hash.COMMENT: SHA1 hash of the upgrade file
